data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified local `main` and `origin/main` both resolve to fd6b433688e15fad445879131119474ec62b05c8, and the commit is contained by local main, origin/main, and the shipped feature branch. The knot has commit and branch tags for the shipped artifact. GitHub Actions for the main push completed successfully: CI 25306895225 and Coverage Badge 25306895228. Shipped code satisfies the accepted scope and no regressions were found in the local or remote gates.
